name: 蔡佳宏 Chia-Hung Dylan Tsai
bio: Associate Professor in the Department of Mechanical Engineering at National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University and director of the Intelligent Microsystem Lab.

name: 朱婕寧 Chieh-Ning Chu
bio: Master's student in the Micro/Nano Division. Her research focuses on on-the-fly switching of droplet generation via vibration in coaxial microfluidic systems.

name: 賴慎徽 Shen Hui Lai
bio: Master's student in the Design and Manufacturing Division. His research focuses on atmospheric-pressure plasma jet-assisted enhancement of thermal resistance in PMMA microfluidic bonding, with skills in plasma systems, mechanical design, and FDM/SLA 3D printing.

name: 陳易唯 Yi-Wei Chen
bio: Master's student in the Robotics Program. He develops software architectures for autonomous mobile robots and embedded systems, implementing ROS 2, SLAM, and autonomous exploration algorithms for navigation and real-world deployment.

name: Shiqi Tang
bio: Master's student at IMLAB.

name: Yuwen Luo
bio: Master's student at IMLAB.

name: Kuan-Ting Lee
bio: Master's student in the Design and Manufacturing Division. His research interests focus on robot vision and intelligent automation. He has worked on visual positioning systems that guide robotic arms for insertion and pick-and-place tasks, with experience in robotic arm operation, image recognition, coordinate transformation, and system integration.

name: 王詩涵 Shih-Han Wang
bio: Master's student at IMLAB. Her conference presentation work includes mesh-assisted plasma microbubbles for enhancing RONS concentration.

name: 籃翊綸 Yi-Lun Lan
bio: Master's student at IMLAB. His conference presentation work includes adaptive feature extraction for microfluidic droplet voiceprint monitoring.

bio: Yoshi is the lab's AI research assistant, supporting literature surveys, website updates, document organization, and research knowledge management for IMLAB.
